rows.description: Candidate drop penalty from BBID. Waiver pickup rule: 35% of current-year salary (5,000 x 35%). Applied to 2025 because the drop occurred on or after the 2024 FreeAgent auction start (2024-07-27). Waiver salary basis taken from preceding BBID add salary of 5,000.
rows.status_detail: Projected from add/drop transaction history plus the pre-drop contract snapshot.

rows.description: Candidate drop penalty from FREE_AGENT. Waiver pickup rule: 35% of current-year salary (25,000 x 35%). Applied to 2025 because the drop occurred on or after the 2024 FreeAgent auction start (2024-07-27).
